creator: johan@stromnet.org
text:
net/p5-File-RsyncP has a broken Makefile, the MAN3 section lists one file with wrong case (FILe vs File) which breaks install.

Fix: 

Change case in Makefile.
How-To-Repeat: portinstall -p p5-File-RsyncP
(dont know about exact make lines but i would guess make package)
